mapper.select: SELECT id, email, password, name, status, created_on, role FROM users WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('users') FROM dual
INSERT INTO USERS ( id, email, password, name, status, created_on, role) VALUES ( #{id}, #{email}, #{password}, #{name}, 'H1', SYSDATE, #{role})
mapper.select: SELECT id, email, name FROM users WHERE id = #{id} AND email = #{email} AND name = #{name}
mapper.insert:
SELECT BEEZ.generate_pk_auto('user_tokens') FROM dual
INSERT INTO user_tokens ( TOKEN_ID, USER_ID, TOKEN_VALUE, TOKEN_TYPE, EXPIRY_DATE, CREATED_ON ) VALUES ( #{tokenId}, #{userId}, #{tokenValue}, #{tokenType}, SYSTIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '30' MINUTE, SYSTIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: { CALL PROC_UPDATE_PASSWORD( #{token, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, mode=IN, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{result, mode=OUT, jdbcType=VARCHAR}) }
